element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns rock-paper-scissors unit matchups in controlled first scenario with equal CPU forces
Integrated from start; players discover terrain advantages through initial engagements

element_introduction_order.element: Supply and logistics (airports for aircraft refuel, supply trucks)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management becomes critical as scenarios progress and CPU unit count increases
Strategic positioning and movement planning deepens with transport availability

element_introduction_order.element: Headquarters unit (tactical objective and attacking unit)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Win condition clarity; defending/capturing headquarters becomes primary strategic goal
Forces strategic optimization and unit efficiency; no AI variance means numerical advantage is primary difficulty lever

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Deliberate turn-based rhythm with strategic pause-and-plan moments; tension builds through accumulating CPU numerical advantage across five scenarios; no time limit allows player-controlled pacing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Scenario 1 features equal unit count for player and CPU, establishing baseline mechanics and unit matchup learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Scenarios 2-4 introduce progressively larger CPU unit advantages while player unit count remains constant; terrain and logistics become decisive factors
difficulty_curve.late_game: Scenario 5 presents maximum CPU numerical superiority; players must optimize unit efficiency and strategic positioning to overcome disadvantage
notable_spikes: Transition from Scenario 1 to 2: CPU gains numerical advantage for first time
Scenario 5: Largest CPU force difference; tests mastery of all mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Difficulty increases not through AI improvements but through CPU receiving more units than player; forces increasingly efficient tactical decisions and unit economy mastery
Supply buildings and fuel mechanics force players to balance offensive positioning with resource management; aircraft refueling at airports creates supply-chain gameplay
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All scenarios require airport/supply truck interaction

notable_level_patterns.description: Landscape affects unit mobility, attack power, and defense; encourages positional strategy and reconnaissance before engagement
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All scenarios; terrain effects universal across map types
